title: Mentorship Matching Program
description: Get paired with an experienced CDOT mentor who shares your interests and career goals.

title: CDOT Toastmasters
description: Build public speaking and leadership confidence in a supportive peer setting.

title: Colorado LTAP Training
description: Local Technical Assistance Program courses on roads, safety, and workforce skills.

title: NHI Technical Courses
description: National Highway Institute training across every transportation discipline.

title: Work Zone Safety Certification
description: Required certification for working safely in and around active work zones.

title: AASHTOWare Project Training
description: Hands-on training for CDOT’s core construction and materials management software.

title: On-the-Job Training (OJT)
description: Structured, hands-on learning embedded directly in real project work.

title: WTS – Women in Transportation
description: A community advancing women in the transportation industry through networking and mentorship.

title: Veterans Employee Resource Group
description: Connection and support for veterans and military families across CDOT.

title: Young Professionals Network
description: Events and mentorship connecting early-career employees statewide.

title: Latinos in Transportation
description: A network celebrating and supporting Latino professionals at CDOT.

title: Individual Development Plan (IDP)
description: A guided template to set goals and map your growth with your supervisor.

title: Career Pathways Guide
description: Explore how roles connect and what it takes to move between them at CDOT.

title: Tuition Reimbursement Program
description: Financial support for continuing education and advanced degrees.

title: PE Licensure Support
description: Resources, study groups, and exam support on the path to your PE license.

title: Emerging Leaders Program
description: A cohort program developing the next generation of CDOT leaders.

title: Supervisor Academy
description: Foundational training for new and aspiring people leaders.

title: LinkedIn Learning Access
description: Free access to thousands of professional and technical online courses.

title: CDOT Technical Library
description: Standards, specs, research reports, and design guidance in one place.

title: CDOT Organizational Chart
description: See how divisions, regions, and teams fit together across the department.
